sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47486" key="h)piodw/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἠπῐο-δώτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n47486.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">giver of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἤπια </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φάρμακα</etym>), of Asclepius, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orph.</author> </bibl> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Εὐχή</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">37</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
